---
title: "Placeholder"
format:
  html:
    theme: default
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        h2 { color: #872046; }

        main.content {
          max-width: 900px;
          margin-left: auto;
          margin-right: auto;
        }
        </style>
editor: visual
---

# Placeholder Page

This page contains example R code inside a Quarto document.

```{r}
library(dplyr)

data <- tibble(
  x = 1:5,
  y = x^2
)

summary <- data %>%
  mutate(z = y + x) %>%
  filter(z >= 10)

summary
```
